ideation: This animation sequence depicts a person using their hand to gesture toward their hair, as if adjusting it or showing it off. The right arm will be the main focus. The left arm will remain relaxed at the side. The sequence starts with the right arm raised and angled towards the head. The hand makes a gentle gesture. Next, the right arm moves slightly closer to the head, with the wrist rotating slightly to refine the pose. Then, the right arm moves back to the original position, and then the hand is returned to the side. The final frame shows the arm completely relaxed at the side. This is expressed as a series of four frames.

frames.beat: right arm lifts, hand gestures towards hair
the hand sweeps closer, adjusting the style
the arm pulls back slightly, a confident flick
the arm returns to rest at the side
